ddls:
CREATE TABLE "posts" (
  "post_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each post */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the post */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score or upvote count of the post */,
  "subreddit" TEXT /* Subreddit where the post is submitted */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL link to the post */,
  "num_comments" INTEGER /* Number of comments on the post */,
  "body" TEXT /* Body or main content of the post */,
  "created" REAL /* Creation timestamp of the post */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Exact datetime when the post was created */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who submitted the post */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the post belongs to */,
  "post_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the type of post (e.g., question, project, research) */,
  "views" INTEGER /* Number of views the post has received */,
  "last_activity" TEXT /* Datetime of the last activity on the post */,
  "is_pinned" INTEGER /* Indicates if the post is pinned */,
  "is_archived" INTEGER /* Indicates if the post is archived */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_posts_post_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_type_id") REFERENCES post_types ("post_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_posts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_posts_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the user joined the platform */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., user, moderator, admin) */,
  "profile_bio" TEXT /* Biographical information about the user */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile picture */,
  "location" TEXT /* User's location */,
  "website" TEXT /* User's personal website or portfolio */,
  "reputation_score" INTEGER /* Reputation score of the user */,
  "is_banned" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user is banned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the category is active */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Datetime when the category was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "post_types" (
  "post_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each post type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the post type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the post type */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the post type is active */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the post type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Datetime when the post type was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("post_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post the comment is on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "created" REAL /* Creation timestamp of the comment */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Exact datetime when the comment was created */,
  "parent_comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent comment (if the comment is a reply) */,
  "votes" INTEGER /* Number of votes (upvotes and downvotes) for the comment */,
  "is_deleted" INTEGER /* Indicates if the comment has been deleted */,
  "edit_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the comment has been edited */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_parent_comment_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_comment_id") REFERENCES comments ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "votes" (
  "vote_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vote */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who cast the vote */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post being voted on (null if it's a comment vote) */,
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the comment being voted on (null if it's a post vote) */,
  "vote_type" TEXT /* Type of vote (e.g., upvote, downvote) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Datetime when the vote was cast */,
  "is_retracted" INTEGER /* Indicates if the vote has been retracted */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the vote */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vote_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_votes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_votes_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_votes_comment_id FOREIGN KEY ("comment_id") REFERENCES comments ("comment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tag */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the tag is active */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the tag */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Datetime when the tag was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "post_tags" (
  "post_tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each post-tag association */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post */,
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tag */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the post-tag association */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Datetime when the post-tag association was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("post_tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_post_tags_tag_id FOREIGN KEY ("tag_id") REFERENCES tags ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_post_tags_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "moderators" (
  "moderator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each moderator */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who is a moderator */,
  "moderator_role" TEXT /* Role of the moderator (e.g., community manager, content moderator) */,
  "moderator_since" TEXT /* Date and time when the user became a moderator */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the moderator is active */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Datetime of the last login of the moderator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("moderator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_moderators_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "moderator_actions" (
  "action_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each moderator action */,
  "moderator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the moderator who took the action */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post the action is related to (null if it's a comment action) */,
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the comment the action is related to (null if it's a post action) */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., delete, lock, feature) */,
  "action_description" TEXT /* Description of the action taken */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Datetime when the action was taken */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the action is active */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the moderator who approved the action (if applicable) */,
  "approved_at" TEXT /* Datetime when the action was approved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("action_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_moderator_actions_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES moderators ("moderator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_moderator_actions_comment_id FOREIGN KEY ("comment_id") REFERENCES comments ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_moderator_actions_moderator_id FOREIGN KEY ("moderator_id") REFERENCES moderators ("moderator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_moderator_actions_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user activity */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., post, comment, vote) */,
  "activity_description" TEXT /* Description of the activity */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Datetime when the activity occurred */,
  "is_private" INTEGER /* Indicates if the activity is private */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user when the activity occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
